title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Sodexo India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Sodexo India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sodexo India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Noida. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sodexo India:
Sodexo India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sodexo India!
